tasks.name: apply-review-agent
tasks.task:
review_file: ~/docs/review/knowledge-review-agent.md
source_report: ~/docs/knowledge-review-agent.md
knowledge_dir: knowledge/agent

If review_file does not exist, stop immediately — nothing to do.

Read review_file and source_report. For each issue raised in review_file, verify it by reading the relevant files in knowledge_dir. Judge whether each criticism is legitimate.

For each issue that is legitimate, apply the correction directly to source_report. Silently skip any issue that does not hold up to verification.

tasks.name: apply-review-summary
tasks.task:
review_file: ~/docs/review/knowledge-review-summary.md
source_report: ~/docs/knowledge-review-summary.md

If review_file does not exist, stop immediately — nothing to do.

Read review_file and source_report, and also read all ~/docs/knowledge-review-*.md per-directory reports (excluding summary) to verify cross-directory claims. For each issue raised in review_file, judge whether each criticism is legitimate.

For each issue that is legitimate, apply the correction directly to source_report. Silently skip any issue that does not hold up to verification.
